title: Discography
description: A resource pack that retextures Music Discs
body:
Music discs have always been an iconic part of Minecraft, though their textures have never changed since they were added over a decade ago.

**Discography retextures all of the music discs currently in Minecraft**. Your collection will look better than ever!

_This is the current list of supported mods:_

- Hominid
- Enderscape
- Jaden's Nether Expansion
- Berry Good
- Vanilla Backport
- Sweety's Archaeology
- Supplementaries
- Promotional Music Discs
- Snowy Spirit
- Oreganized
- Nirvana
- Upgrade Aquatic
- Neapolitan
- Environmental
- No Man's Land
- Alex's Caves
- Vista
- Spawn
- Doom & Gloom
- Caverns & Chasms
- Verdance
